name: OPTIC NEURITIS
definition: nerve involvement by inflammation, degeneration, demyelination
dominant_finding: normal / mildly enlarged optic nerve + chiasm
discriminating_features: normal / mildly enlarged optic nerve + chiasm
mild enlargement + enhancement of optic nerve best demonstrated on axial T1WI
leptomeningeal enhancement obscures lucent optic nerve

CT: normal / mildly enlarged optic nerve + chiasm
MR: mild enlargement + enhancement of optic nerve best demonstrated on axial T1WI
leptomeningeal enhancement obscures lucent optic nerve

clinical.Prognosis: spontaneous improvement of visual acuity within 1-2 weeks
